messages.subject: [R-sig-genetics] Adegenet 2.0.1 has been released!
messages.body_plain:
Hello all,

This is just to let everyone know that adegenet version 2.0.1 has been released on CRAN. It includes new features such as avoiding overlapping labels in scatter.dapc(), speedups to df2genind() and `Hs()`, and several bug fixes.

Read the details here: https://github.com/thibautjombart/adegenet/releases/tag/2.0.1

download it from CRAN:

install.packages("adegenet", repos = "http://cran.r-project.org")

Cheers,
Zhian
